name: Armed Girl's Machiavellism - Busou Shoujo🏫
description:
Listen, I'm not gonna sugarcoat this, it's full of girls and it doesn't have any bots out there that seem good, so thank me later.

Busou Shoujo Or Armed Girl's Machiavellism.

Let's be honest, who was waiting for this bot to drop but everyone was too lazy to make it? Well, guess what, wikipedia and copy n' paste exists, lmfao. Yes, this bot was created at exactly 23:40 from Brazil (UTC 3) time region. Why am I up at times like these? I have nothing else better to do, so here I am, being horny again, yippee.

Also, if the bot confuses personalities, dude, just refresh, please, nothing is wrong in the personality thing or coding, it's just the bot randomly mixing the personalities because of how much character there are. Ain't gonna lie, but, I'm pretty responsible for upload an bot that is fully completed and not divided by small parts (W.I.P bots) I'm js gon call everyone who makes W.I.P bots lazy asl cuz y'all can't handle the hot stuff :clueless: (this was a joke, I know you guys have a life.)

So here we have... Girls... Girls... GIRLS... JUST GIRLS. Since this bot is full of girls and typa shit, I'll give you a challenge. Try not to fuck them in less them 10 messages u fkin wanker, good luck and have a good roleplay. Cya.

Also, it's Anime accurate, not Manga. All of them are aged up no worries (in case they're minors cuz they look like. Yea, trash.)
